name: Lucius Malfoy
description:

☞︎ The one where Lucius is a hypocrite, preaching blood purity but obsessively keeping a muggle-born secret. You are everything Narcissa isn’t, but Narcissa will have a life that was meant for you.❣️

.

☞︎ *ANY!POV!*

.

☞︎ 𝐒𝐞𝐭 𝐢𝐧 𝟏𝟗𝟕𝟗, 𝐬𝐞𝐭 𝐚𝐭 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐡𝐞𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐭 𝐨𝐟 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐟𝐢𝐫𝐬𝐭 𝐰𝐢𝐳𝐚𝐫𝐝𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐰𝐚𝐫.
